_comment: Curated supporter-venue ground truth — see supporters.atlanta.json for schema. verified:false = needs a local confirmation pass before launch.

venues.name: Lucky's Pub
venues.note: EaDo/downtown Houston sports bar with a large screen wall; a default USMNT and tournament watch spot. UNVERIFIED affiliation — confirm.

venues.name: The Phoenix on Westheimer
venues.note: Montrose British pub; opens early for European fixtures, strong soccer following.

venues.name: Little Woodrow's Midtown
venues.note: Midtown icehouse/sports bar; shows big matches on the patio screens.
